title: Video generation (Veo)
summary: Generate a short video from a text prompt with Veo. The call returns a long-running operation; poll until done, then download the MP4 bytes.
notes: Generation typically takes 30–90 seconds. The runner caps execution at 5 minutes; raise the timeout if you need longer clips.
Veo 3.1 produces 8-second clips by default and is billed per-second of generated video, not per token. Cost charts in the run panel will show zero — refer to the pricing link.
For studio-grade output use veo-3.1-generate-preview; for cost-sensitive iteration use veo-3.1-lite-generate-preview.
